description_long: This is a compact, freestanding wooden cabinet with a rectangular top and a single front-facing door, complemented by a small drawer beneath the door. The cabinet features clean, straight lines and a light beige wood finish, giving it a modern yet classic appearance. The front door is bordered by subtle panel detailing and is equipped with a small round knob for easy access. The sides and back of the cabinet are plain, with the same light wood texture and no visible hardware or openings. The top surface is flat and extends slightly beyond the body, providing additional space for placing objects. This cabinet is suitable for use in urban environments such as entryways, sidewalks, or garages, offering both storage and surface utility.
description: A light beige wooden cabinet with a single front door, a lower drawer, and a flat top surface, featuring clean lines and a modern classic look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main door with a round knob and a lower drawer, both framed by subtle paneling.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, flat wood panel with no visible hardware or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view with a featureless, flat wood panel matching the sides in color and texture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain wood panel and no hardware.
